---
# DevOps User Profile — Auto-generated by /init profile
# Last updated: {TIMESTAMP}
# Organization: {ORGANIZATION}

lastRefresh: "{DATE_ISO}"
schemaVersion: "6.2.0"

identity:
  displayName: "{DISPLAY_NAME}"
  email: "{EMAIL}"
  guid: "{USER_GUID}"
  uniqueName: "{UNIQUE_NAME}"

role: "{ROLE}"
team: "{DEFAULT_TEAM}"
defaultProject: "{DEFAULT_PROJECT}"

preferences:
  taskPrefix: "{TASK_PREFIX}"
  notifyOnAssignment: true
  autoLogTimeOnCompletion: true
  sprintBoard: "current"

taskTemplates:
# {TASK_TEMPLATES_YAML}
# Fetched from: Project Settings → Boards → Templates → Task
# Example:
#  - name: "[Dev]"
#    description: "Backend/Full-Stack development"
#    keywords: ["api", "endpoint", "database", "backend"]
#  - name: "[Front]"
#    description: "Frontend development"
#    keywords: ["ui", "component", "css", "frontend"]
#  - name: "[QC Bug Fixing]"
#    description: "QA - Bug fixing and verification"
#    keywords: ["fix", "bug", "patch", "debug"]
#  - name: "[QC Test Execution]"
#    description: "QA - Test case execution"
#    keywords: ["test", "execute", "test case", "regression"]
#  - name: "[IMP]"
#    description: "Implementation, deployment"
#    keywords: ["deploy", "config", "setup", "migration"]

statePermissions:
# {STATE_PERMISSIONS_YAML}
# Auto-generated from role during /init profile
# Source: data/state_machine.json → rolePermissions[role].permissions
# DO NOT edit manually — re-run /init profile to refresh

projects:
# {PROJECTS_YAML}

teamMembers:
# {TEAM_MEMBERS_YAML}
---

- **Team**: {DEFAULT_TEAM}
- **Task Prefix**: {TASK_PREFIX}
